subcodes.first_line: Verily thy book hath attained unto the presence of thy Lord, the All-Bountiful, and the Countenance of the Ancient of Days hath turned towards it, as a token of His grace. He verily is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد فاز کتابک بمحضر ربک الفیاض و توجه الیه وجه القدم فضلا من عنده انه لهو
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @call to action, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @love of God
